arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford 'close' to joining Aston Villa in MEGA deal
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford 'close' to joining Aston Villa in MEGA deal In encouraging news for the winger, Aston Villa boss Unai Emery “personally requested” that the Villans chase the attacker.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa are closing in on shock loan deal for Marcus Rashford - as Unai Emery targets wantaway Man United star after Jhon Duran's exit
arts.sum: Aston Villa are reportedly close to agreeing a deal to sign Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford on loan.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano: Wolves ‘Table Bid’ to Sign ‘Superstar’ Midfielder
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers have already signed Emmanuel Agbadou from Reims, but they are looking to add further in the final days of the window

arts.ttl: David Ornstein: Aston Villa 'Close to Agreeing' Deal to Sign Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: Aston Villa are close to agreeing a deal to sign Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford on loan for the rest of the season.

arts.ttl: Jhon Duran's eye-watering Saudi salary broken down after £64m Aston Villa exit
arts.sum: Jhon Duran will be paid handsomely in Saudi Arabia after securing his £64m move to Cristiano Ronaldo's Al-Nassr with a tax-free salary that is worth roughly £1.4m every month and £320,000 a week

arts.ttl: Wolves back ‘in pole position’ for signing after new development – Player ‘on the way’ to Molineux
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers have been trying to sign RC Lens’ Kevin Danso over the past week or so. Initially, the French press reported Wolves made an offer of €20m and it didn’t please the Ligue 1 side. Two days ago, L’Equipe stated Jorge Mendes could help the English club sign him on loan in the winter The post Wolves back ‘in pole position’ for signing after new development – Player ‘on the way’ to Molineux appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Fan 'had head stomped on' as chaos erupted in brawl during Aston Villa vs Celtic
arts.sum: Aston Villa's Champions League clash against Celtic was marred by violence from fans, with West Midlands Police announcing it had made a total of 21 arrests - 19 of those being Celtic supporters

arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer stance revealed after fresh injury blow
arts.sum: "We signed Andres Garcia because, as well, he is a young player with the potential he can show he's working with us, I think, 10 days more or less, and he's he's training very well, and Kosta, I spoke about him, and our decision is done," Emery explained when asked if Nedeljkovic will be kept in the squad after Cashs's injury. Nedeljkovic, meanwhile, is expected to depart on loan in the final three days of the winter window after Villa signed 21-year-old right-back Andres Garcia from Levante for £6m last month.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery's guilt tactic earns praise as Arsenal's Ollie Watkins transfer move in tatters
arts.sum: Unai Emery has earned praise for how he's spoken about Ollie Watkins' future as Arsenal look to tempt the striker to the Emirates, only for their approaches to have been rebuffed

arts.ttl: How to watch Wolves vs Aston Villa
arts.sum: Wolves vs Aston Villa kicks off at 5.30pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 5pm. Wolves are back at Molineux this Saturday evening as Vitor Pereira's side host Aston Villa under the lights in the Premier League - find out how to follow the live action below.
